steps.prompt: Which word is the finite verb?

hints.Evangelizare: 'Evangelizare' is an infinitive, not a finite verb
hints.pauperibus: 'pauperibus' is a noun/adjective in the dative/ablative plural
hints.me: 'me' is a pronoun, not a verb

hints.present indicative: Present of 'mittere' would be 'mittit' — 'misit' is perfect

hints.misceo, miscere, miscui, mixtum: These are principal parts of 'misceo' (to mix)
hints.moneo, monere, monui, monitum: These are principal parts of 'moneo' (to warn)
hints.moveo, movere, movi, motum: These are principal parts of 'moveo' (to move)

steps.prompt: 'Evangelizare' is what form of the verb?

hints.imperative: Imperative would be 'evangeliza' — 'evangelizare' ending in -are is the infinitive
hints.participle: A participle would be 'evangelizans' or 'evangelizatus' — '-are' marks the infinitive
hints.gerund: A gerund would be 'evangelizandi/evangelizando' — '-are' marks the infinitive

hints.to read aloud: 'to read aloud' is 'recitare' — 'evangelizare' means to bring good news
hints.to baptize: 'to baptize' is 'baptizare' — 'evangelizare' means to preach good news
hints.to heal: 'to heal' is 'sanare' — 'evangelizare' means to preach good news

hints.baptizo, baptizare, baptizavi, baptizatu: These are principal parts of 'baptizo' (to baptize)
hints.nuntio, nuntiare, nuntiavi, nuntiatum: These are principal parts of 'nuntio' (to announce)
hints.praedico, praedicare, praedicavi, praedi: These are principal parts of 'praedico' (to proclaim)

hints.nominative: Nominative plural would be 'pauperes' — 'pauperibus' is dative/ablative plural
hints.accusative: Accusative plural would be 'pauperes' — 'pauperibus' is dative plural (indirect object)
hints.ablative: 'pauperibus' could be ablative, but here it is dative — 'to preach TO the poor'

hints.1st declension: 1st declension nouns have genitive in -ae — 'pauperis' ends in -is
hints.2nd declension: 2nd declension nouns have genitive in -i — 'pauperis' ends in -is
hints.4th declension: 4th declension nouns have genitive in -us — 'pauperis' ends in -is

translation: He sent me to preach the good news to the poor
